name: Dragon TF / Transformation
description:
(CW: Transformation, minor mental change)
All over the world, people are changing. Magic is reawakening, and chaos and panic have consumed the world.
Among the many who have changed, some are even becoming dragons- you are one such person.
But what sort of dragon you become- and whether or not you consider this lucky- is for you to decide!

Note: This is a freeform bot. You're meant to describe the dragon you become. Using a custom persona can help a lot with this- and the AI will be generally less confused, but in that case you may wish to give it a prompt describing who you used to be. Use this as an example, and put it into one of your replies, parentheses and all other symbols included.
(Prompt: "{{user}} used to be a male human accountant with brown hair named John Smith.")
creator: Orbital_Lithium
